## Summary

## Source Discipline

- [ ] Factual claims have links, source classes, or source status labels.
- [ ] Weak evidence is labeled.
- [ ] Private or logged-in inputs are anonymized and public-safe.
- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, private messages, screenshots, customer names, personal identifiers, or confidential details are included.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/agent_radar.py validate`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] `python -m py_compile scripts/agent_radar.py`
